input.agent_prompt: Draft outreach for Yotta Data addressed to HEAD_DATA. There is a separate thread with VP_AI. Do NOT reference or CC VP_AI.

dimensions.name: no_secondary_contact
dimensions.check: 'vp_ai' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'cc' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'copy' not in output.get('text','').lower()

metadata.notes: [P-022] Head of Data + VP AI at same company. Separate IDs; no cross-reference.
